title: Player Hitbox Fix
description: Fixes player hitbox collision issues allowing cobwebs, rails, and minecarts to be placed through players without misclicks or placement blocking
body:
Player Hitbox Fix is a small but impactful quality-of-life mod that fixes interaction issues caused by the player hitbox 🛠️
Normally, the player hitbox can block block placement and interactions, making it frustrating to place certain blocks or entities in tight spaces or during fast-paced gameplay 😤

With this mod installed, you can place cobwebs, rails, and minecarts directly through a player’s hitbox 🕸️🚃 without interference. This is especially useful in PvP ⚔️, minigames 🎮, redstone setups 🔴, and multiplayer environments 🌍 where precise placement really matters.

The mod works seamlessly in the background, stays close to vanilla behavior 🍦, and is fully client-side 💻
It simply makes sure your placement goes exactly where you aim 🎯 — not blocked by someone standing in the way.
